dr10_reachability.dr10_v1_annual_turnover_estimate: Per-portfolio computation: if each instrument sized at 0.5pct of equity and basket holds positions concurrently, turnover scales with basket size. For 3-instrument basket: turnover could be ~3x s13-d1's ~85 = 255 (worse) OR if sized 0.5pct per-position aggregated to portfolio: turnover stays similar to single-instrument case
dr10_reachability.dr10_v2_fires: Depends on whether per-portfolio S2_cost_drag exceeds 5pct (likely NO if instruments are similar-cost futures)

k9_reachability.k9_v1_clearance_at_baseline: LIKELY CLEARS (100/y x 4.6y ~ 460 trades; well over K9=100)
k9_reachability.signal_density_estimate_trades_per_year: ~3x single-instrument rate (assuming RSI(2) per instrument): 3 x 34 ~ 100/y total across basket

direction_options_advisory_only_enumerat.mechanic_family: F3 RSI or F1 Donchian (either; choose to optimize K9 + DR10 jointly)
direction_options_advisory_only_enumerat.net_status_for_existing_chains_v1: Would likely fail DR10 v1 same as s13-d1 unless sizing reduced

dr10_reachability.dr10_v1_annual_turnover_estimate: Heavily reduced via fractional sizing. At $200k equity with 0.05pct per-trade notional ($100/trade), 50 trades/year = $5k turnover = 0.025 ratio - BELOW v1 threshold 0.50
dr10_reachability.dr10_v1_s2_cost_drag_estimate: <1pct (much smaller notional means much smaller per-trade cost impact in absolute terms)

k9_reachability.signal_density_estimate_trades_per_year: Universe-dependent; cash equities at intraday or daily timeframe can produce 50-200+ trades/year per instrument

direction_options_advisory_only_enumerat.rationale_for_consideration: Three of four trading-bot tracks this session terminated (s10-D2 PARK, s12-D1 PARK, T1 TERMINAL). Parallel s13-d1 also TERMINAL. The cumulative evidence is: single-instrument futures at retail scale faces K9/DR10 structural tension; cross-asset basket faces K9 OOS sample-size; F1 and F3 mechanic families both exposed limitations. A pause to reassess strategy-research methodology before authoring more candidates is a legitimate option.
